newsletters.name: The Batch
newsletters.description: Andrew Ng's weekly AI newsletter covering the most important developments.

newsletters.name: Import AI
newsletters.description: Jack Clark's newsletter on AI policy and research.

podcasts.name: The Gradient Podcast
podcasts.description: In-depth interviews with AI researchers and practitioners.

youtube_channels.name: Agentic Engineering and the Lethal Trifecta
youtube_channels.description: Expert analysis from Simon Willison on the security risks and practical engineering challenges of building autonomous AI agents.

blogs.name: Lilian Weng's Blog
blogs.description: Thorough technical deep-dives into ML concepts by OpenAI researcher.

blogs.name: Qwen 3.5 Model Collection
blogs.description: Access to Alibaba's latest open-weight models, which feature native multimodal support and represent the current state-of-the-art for open-source vision-language tasks.

blogs.name: Project Silica: Cloud Storage for the Millennia
blogs.description: A deep dive into Microsoft's revolutionary glass-based storage technology that uses plasma explosions to archive data for thousands of years.

blogs.name: Google 2026 Responsible AI Progress Report
blogs.description: A primary source document detailing how one of the world's largest AI labs implements safety, ethics, and red-teaming across its Gemini model family.

blogs.name: Andrej Karpathy on 'Claws'
blogs.description: Expert analysis defining the 'Claws' layer—a new software architecture for coordinating LLM agents in multi-step, complex workflows.

blogs.name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Technical Overview
blogs.description: A deep dive into Google's most cost-effective model to date, explaining the architectural trade-offs made to achieve high-efficiency scaling for high-volume tasks.

blogs.name: LLMs and the Unmasking of Pseudonymous Users
blogs.description: A critical analysis of new research showing how large language models can deanonymize users by identifying unique writing patterns across disparate datasets.

blogs.name: TerraPower Natrium Technology Overview
blogs.description: Primary technical details on the next-generation nuclear reactor design that just received a landmark NRC permit to help meet AI's massive energy demands.

blogs.name: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
blogs.description: A technical deep dive into the parallelism techniques required to train models with massive context windows like the newly released Claude 4.6.

blogs.name: Equipping the Responses API with a Computer Environment
blogs.description: An engineering blog post explaining how to build secure, scalable agent runtimes using hosted containers and shell tools.

blogs.name: Invisible Unicode Supply-Chain Attacks
blogs.description: A critical security analysis of how hidden characters are being used to inject malicious code into open-source repositories while bypassing human review.

blogs.name: Agentic Engineering Patterns: Using Git with coding agents
blogs.description: A long-form technical guide by Simon Willison on practical strategies for managing state and version control when working with autonomous AI sub-agents.

blogs.name: Monitoring internal coding agents for misalignment
blogs.description: An official OpenAI primary source explaining the use of chain-of-thought monitoring to detect and mitigate risks in agentic AI systems.

research_trackers.name: Papers With Code
research_trackers.description: Track state-of-the-art ML papers with their implementations.

research_trackers.name: IT-Bench and MAST: Diagnosing Enterprise Agent Failures
research_trackers.description: A collaborative research effort by IBM and UC Berkeley that provides a rigorous framework for understanding why AI agents fail in complex enterprise environments.

research_trackers.name: OpenAI First Proof Submissions
research_trackers.description: Primary research data showing how reasoning-based AI models attempt expert-level mathematical proofs, highlighting current capabilities and limitations.

research_trackers.name: GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card
research_trackers.description: The official technical documentation for OpenAI's latest reasoning model, detailing safety evaluations and the internal 'thinking' processes of the 5.4 architecture.

research_trackers.name: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
research_trackers.description: A primary research paper detailing how to train models to prioritize trusted system instructions over untrusted user inputs to prevent prompt injection.

research_trackers.name: LLM in a Flash: Efficient Streaming from Flash Storage
research_trackers.description: The foundational research paper enabling the local execution of massive models on consumer hardware by optimizing how weights are loaded from storage.

tools.name: Claude Code Documentation
tools.description: The official guide for Anthropic's new agentic CLI, which allows developers to automate entire coding workflows and security audits directly from the terminal.

tools.name: llama.cpp GitHub Repository
tools.description: The foundational infrastructure for local LLM inference, now under the Hugging Face umbrella to ensure its continued growth as an open-source standard.

tools.name: OpenClaw Agent Framework
tools.description: A high-velocity open-source project for building autonomous agents that has recently gained significant industry attention for its scalability and tool-integration capabilities.

tools.name: Unsloth AI Training Library
tools.description: An essential tool for developers looking to fine-tune LLMs with 2x more speed and 70% less memory, now integrated with Hugging Face for free training jobs.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: A high-performance CLI tool for agentic coding that utilizes prompt caching to minimize latency and cost during complex development tasks.

tools.name: Qwen 3.5 Model Collection
tools.description: The latest open-weights multimodal models from Alibaba, specifically designed to handle vision-based agentic tasks and complex reasoning.

tools.name: Qwen 3.5 Open-Weight Model Family
tools.description: Alibaba's latest open-source release which currently leads many global benchmarks; essential for developers looking to deploy high-performance local LLMs.

tools.name: Codex Security: Research Preview
tools.description: An AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect and patch vulnerabilities, representing the next step in autonomous cybersecurity.

tools.name: SpeciesNet: Open-Source AI for Wildlife Conservation
tools.description: A practical, open-source computer vision tool developed by Google Research that demonstrates how to apply AI to complex environmental and sustainability datasets.

tools.name: Sarvam 105B: Regional Language Optimization
tools.description: The first competitive large-scale open-source model optimized specifically for Indian languages, providing a blueprint for regional AI development.

tools.name: Promptfoo AI Security Platform
tools.description: The open-source testing framework recently acquired by OpenAI that allows developers to find vulnerabilities and evaluate LLM output quality.

tools.name: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Open-Source Robotics
tools.description: A comprehensive library for training and deploying AI-driven robotics, featuring new tools for data collection and hardware integration.

tools.name: Hugging Face Hub Storage Buckets
tools.description: A new infrastructure tool that provides native S3-compatible storage for managing large-scale datasets and model assets directly on the Hugging Face Hub.

tools.name: Astral: High-performance Python developer tools
tools.description: The official home of uv and ruff, the tools OpenAI acquired this week to modernize and accelerate the Python ecosystem for AI development.

tools.name: Mistral Small 4 on Hugging Face
tools.description: The primary repository for Mistral's latest 119B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model, released under the Apache 2.0 license for open-weights reasoning.

tools.name: AWS Neuron SDK for Trainium
tools.description: The essential toolkit for developers looking to port models to Amazon's Trainium chips, which are gaining traction as a viable alternative to Nvidia hardware.

tools.name: Trivy: Vulnerability and Misconfiguration Scanner
tools.description: The industry-standard security tool central to this week's supply-chain attack alerts; essential for any developer managing AI infrastructure.

tools.name: OpenAI API Reference: GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano
tools.description: Official documentation for the new GPT-5.4 variants, providing technical specifications for high-volume API and sub-agent reasoning workloads.

communities.name: r/MachineLearning
communities.description: Reddit's main ML research discussion community.
